name: Sid Caesar
blurb: A founding genius of live TV sketch comedy.
bio: Sid Caesar (1922-2014) was an American comedian and actor who led Your Show of Shows and Caesar's Hour in the 1950s, pioneering live television sketch comedy and famous for elaborate double-talk in foreign-sounding gibberish. His writers' room launched Mel Brooks, Neil Simon, and Carl Reiner.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
